Homeschool Assistance & Real Time Help, Support, & Guidance for Parents

You don't need to navigate
the ups & downs of homeschooling alone.

Homeschool Decision Making Made Easier & For Busy Homeschool Parents who Want Peace of Mind

55+ families served 30+ long-term families Child Development Specialist Apply Any Time of Year
Hi, I'm Maria

Child Development Specialist

I hold a master's in leadership and a bachelor's in child & youth studies. I have served over 55 homeschooling families short term, and over 30 families long-term helping them

& relieve stress on their homeschooling journey.

Whether you are homeschooling your preschooler, elementary-age, middle or high school students, I can help.

I'm here to support you in finding a good fit routine, curriculum that keeps you connected with your homeschooler.

No research rabbit holes for you, I pull you out of those and keep you focused on what matters, your child!

"It is so much easier for my son to navigate his day and he's actually having more fun learning. He's in charge of his learning process and has a fantastic mentor and support. Maria helped him grow; offering a sense of ease and confidence that is not offered in public schooling and creating a beautiful resume with him. My son has told his friends this experience; he feels good about the person he is and about his future."

— Shannon
